problem.title: Final Problem 5
problem.description: This is the fifth and final problem to reach our target of 251 problems.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Dynamic Programming [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: This solution uses bottom-up dynamic programming to compute the nth Fibonacci number. A dp array stores each sub-result so that dp[i] = dp[i-1] + dp[i-2], building the answer iteratively without redundant computation. The key insight is that each Fibonacci number depends only on the two preceding values, making DP a natural and efficient fit.
